rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"A review-fix run introduced new TS errors in test files that weren't in the original build failures. Fixing one thing can break another.","scope":"src/routes/notifications.test.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"A 'uses default store' test pollutes a singleton store, affecting subsequent tests. Tests sharing singleton state must clean up or isolate.","scope":"notificationService.test.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When mocking NextRequest via `makeNextRequest` with spread, ensure all constructor arguments are accounted for or TS2554 errors occur.","scope":"test mocking"}]}
